patches.description: Make header.js defensive when the nav-tools section is missing (DA.live strips empty divs), preventing a null-reference crash.
patches.exit: TODO(step-8): file PR to hlxsites/aem-boilerplate-commerce; delete on merge

patches.description: Decode __ back to / when extracting a SKU from the URL, so SKUs containing forward slashes survive the round-trip to the Commerce API.
patches.exit: TODO(step-8): file PR to hlxsites/aem-boilerplate-commerce; delete on merge

patches.description: Encode forward slashes in SKUs as __ when building product links, preserving slash information that sanitizeName() would otherwise destroy. Pairs with product-link-sku-encoding.
patches.exit: TODO(step-8): file PR to hlxsites/aem-boilerplate-commerce; delete on merge

patches.description: Sanitize SKU aliases (replace / with -) in the AEM Assets image slot so SKUs containing forward slashes produce valid asset URLs. Consolidates what would otherwise be 14+ per-block import swaps into one dropin patch.
patches.precondition: const{wrapper:s,alias:m,params:r,imageProps:i}=e;if(!i.src)throw new Error("An image source is required. Please provide a `src` or `imageProps.src`.");const n=s??document.createElement("div"),o=w(i.src,m,r)
patches.replacement: const{wrapper:s,alias:m,params:r,imageProps:i}=e;if(!i.src)throw new Error("An image source is required. Please provide a `src` or `imageProps.src`.");const sanitizedAlias=m.replace(/\//g,"-");const n=s??document.createElement("div"),o=w(i.src,sanitizedAlias,r)
patches.exit: TODO(step-8): file PR upstream to the @dropins aem-assets package; delete when the released dropin sanitizes aliases

patches.description: Fix the account-sidebar selector race that renders an empty left nav on freshly-published storefronts by also matching the authored structure (main > div > ol > li).
patches.exit: TODO(step-8): file PR to hlxsites/aem-boilerplate-commerce (cf. fork PR #2); delete on merge

patches.description: Encode forward slashes as __ in the product-teaser Details link. The teaser builds links via rootLink() directly, bypassing commerce.js getProductLink, so it needs its own slash encoding.
patches.exit: TODO(step-8): file PR to demo-system-stores/accs-citisignal; delete on merge

patches.description: Render standard Commerce media URLs directly in the product-teaser instead of forcing every image through the AEM Assets delivery path (which breaks non-AEM-Assets image sources).
patches.exit: TODO(step-8): file PR to demo-system-stores/accs-citisignal; delete on merge
